channel.title: Penetration-Testing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Penetration-Testing on Pi Stack

item.title: Pwndoc vs Serpico vs Dradis CE: Best Self-Hosted Pentest Reporting Tools 2026
item.description: Penetration testing teams face a constant challenge: findings scattered across spreadsheets, inconsistent report formats, and zero collaboration between team members. Dedicated pentest reporting platforms solve this by centralizing vulnerability data, standardizing deliverables, and enabling real-time team collaboration — all while keeping sensitive client data on your own infrastructure.
